name: Shippit Integration Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can access comprehensive shipping automation by integrating "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":" with Shippit, streamlining order fulfilment from POS and online sales through automated courier booking and label printing. This integration helps reduce fulfilment processing time and manual shipping errors, enabling faster order dispatch and improved customer delivery experiences across your retail operations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Understanding the Shippit integration benefits and requirements helps retail operators decide if this shipping automation solution aligns with their fulfilment workflow needs, with options for single or multi-outlet configurations depending on your retail operations structure."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphfnEAA.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphfnEAA.jpg","embedType":"image","displaySize":"large","float":"none","name":"shippit_integration (1).jpg"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Shippit integration combines the strength of Retail Express' inventory management with Shippit's advanced shipping features, allowing businesses to streamline their shipping processes and reduce manual double handling."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Shippit Integration is available at "},{"text":"$19 per month","bold":true},{"text":". To request a Licence, please "},{"type":"a","url":"https://www.zoho.com/forms/?serviceurl=/virtualoffice112/form/ShippitIntegrationActivationForm","children":[{"text":"click here"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Using Shippit"}],"data-id":"using-shippit"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When a sale is Fulfilled in Retail Express, the sale is automatically sent to Shippit. Sales can be fulfilled either individually within POS, or in bulk using the "},{"text":"Fulfilment Report"},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Delivery Service in Shippit is automatically selected using the Freight Type selected on the sale (either by the customer shopping online or manually in POS - as per below)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Freight Types are mapped to corresponding Shippit Delivery Services within Retail Express.\n\n"},{"text":"Manually selecting a Freight Type in POS","italic":true,"bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/45XHQF3J0IYB/image-283-29.webp","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/45XHQF3J0IYB/image-283-29.webp","name":"image Integration:"}],"data-id":"features-of-shippit-integration"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Retail Express Shippit integration is compatible with a range of features, listed below. We're always considering opportunities to expand the feature, so if there's something you'd like to be added to the Shippit integration why not "},{"type":"a","url":"https://forms.zohopublic.com/virtualoffice112/form/ShippitFeatureRequest/formperma/PtX4ngXp_sImKlKQ2g2g8CZDGB0ytGTRdUQAyOu61Ls","children":[{"text":"let us know"}]},{"text":"?"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Features"}],"data-id":"features"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Synchronise both "},{"text":"instore","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"online","bold":true},{"text":" orders from Retail Express to Shippit"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Multi-location","bold":true},{"text":" shipping"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Split order fulfilment","bold":true},{"text":" (ship one order from multiple stores)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Partial Fulfilment","bold":true},{"text":" (multiple fulfilments for the same order)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Domestic","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"International","bold":true},{"text":" orders"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product Details synchronised","bold":true},{"text":" (SKU, Product Title/Short Description, Price, Quantity, Quantity Fulfilled/Packed - used to indicate when the number of products sent is less than the quantity ordered)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Synchronise "},{"text":"Total Product Weight ","bold":true},{"text":"for shipment"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"View the "},{"text":"Shippit Tracking Number","bold":true},{"text":" within POS sale"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Link to view "},{"text":"Tracking Status","bold":true},{"text":" available when viewing the sale in POS"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Automatically create new Freight Types","bold":true},{"text":" from incoming online sales (Shopify Connector and eCommerce API integrations using the FreightType field)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"View selected Freight Type","bold":true},{"text":" for a sale (POS and Fulfilment Report)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Filter Freight Types","bold":true},{"text":" in the Fulfilment Report (e.g. fulfil Express Shipping orders first)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Configurable Customer Invoice Number","bold":true},{"text":" (select between Retail Express Order Number or External Order Reference - recommended if using Shopify Connector)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Limitations"}],"data-id":"limitations"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product Dimensions ","bold":true},{"text":"not synchronised (only total shipment product weight)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tracking Number ","bold":true},{"text":"not visible from the Fulfilment Report (only POS)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tracking Numbers","bold":true},{"text":" not synchronised with Shopify/API integrations"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Printing Labels","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"booking shipment","bold":true},{"text":" managed via Shippit only"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Multiple parcels per SKU","bold":true},{"text":" (you can manually add additional parcels via Shippit)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Live Quotes","bold":true},{"text":" not available"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Resynchronising orders","bold":true},{"text":" not available"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Automatic Freight Type creation","bold":true},{"text":" available in the eCommerce API for custom integrations"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"One way synchronisation","bold":true},{"text":" from Retail Express to Shippit; changes made in Shippit will not be synchronised to Retail Express"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Shippit Error Messages During Order Processing"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When processing orders through the "},{"text":"Retail Express–Shippit integration","bold":true},{"text":", you may occasionally see error messages displayed in the "},{"text":"Fulfilment Details","bold":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Tracking Details","bold":true},{"text":" section while attempting to send an order to Shippit."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These messages are "},{"text":"intentional responses returned directly from Shippit","bold":true},{"text":". They are designed to highlight issues related to shipping configuration, order data, or Shippit account setup (for example, missing delivery details, invalid service selection, or account-level restrictions)."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9GGPN1KDA8IF/shippit-sync-error.png","name":"shippit sync error.png","type":"image/png","size":83597,"width":1533,"height":701,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F9GGPN1KDA8IF%2Fshippit-sync-error.png","active":true,"mediaID":1929,"dateInserted":"2026-01-21T08:39:17+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image","embedStyle":"rich_embed_card"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"What You Should Do"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you encounter one of these error messages:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Review the error message shown in the "},{"text":"Tracking Details","bold":true},{"text":" panel for guidance."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Verify the order details (delivery method, address, freight type, or fulfilment outlet)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"If the issue persists or the message is unclear, "},{"text":"contact Shippit Support or your Shippit Account Manager","bold":true},{"text":" for assistance, as they can confirm the exact reason for the rejection and advise on next steps."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📋 "},{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" Retail Express cannot override or resolve Shippit-generated errors, as they originate from Shippit’s shipping and validation logic."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Purchase a
